hypothesis: Self-supervised fine-tuning of a pre-trained direct-force NNIP on unlabeled target-system configurations by minimizing the Force Delta (without any DFT labels) will reduce the DFT-validated RMS force error on adversarial OOD structures by at least 15% relative to the un-tuned model while keeping the in-distribution error within ±5% of baseline across both Orb and EquiformerV2 architectures.
